view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for identity verification through ID upload and facial recognition is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for identity verification through ID upload and facial recognition is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement of identity verification as outlined in the use case. The evidence from the linked use case explicitly states the need for 'Identity verification (ID upload, facial recognition)' and describes the process of ID verification during the candidate's check-in. This direct reference confirms that the requirement is covered, as it aligns with the expected result of the exploratory step.
